raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Golden State Innovation Act aims to incentivize the innovation of life-saving therapies, including vaccines for COVID-19.",
    "California life sciences companies have spent trillions of dollars developing tests, treatments, and vaccines for COVID-19.",
    "Restoring the R&D tax credit can help in permanently eradicating the pandemic.",
    "California’s life sciences sector is described as a biopharmaceutical innovation hub, contributing significantly to global health.",
    "Investments in medical research have generated more than $11 billion in new sales revenues and taxes for California.",
    "California companies entered more than 1,380 medicines into clinical trials in 2019, targeting serious conditions with unmet medical needs.",
    "California's R&D tax credits incentivize businesses to invest in research activities that generate employment opportunities in science and engineering.",
    "California's life sciences ecosystem produces well-trained PhDs who contribute to the industry.",
    "California must remove financial barriers to innovation to stay competitive in the life sciences sector.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has amplified the need for innovative solutions in healthcare.",
    "California’s tax incentives are crucial for building and maintaining a skilled workforce in the biotech industry.",
    "High-speed development of anti-COVID vaccines has showcased the capabilities of skilled research and development teams.",
    "Resuming California’s R&D tax credits is critical for fostering biomedical innovation necessary for public health.",
    "Research and development in biotechnology is essential for economic recovery and improving healthcare outcomes in California.",
    "Life sciences companies contribute to job creation and economic growth in California.",
    "Well-paying jobs are generated by innovation in the life sciences sector."
  ]
}
```
